NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

This Non-Disclosure Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into as of October 15, 2023, by and between Dr. Jonathan Tan, NRIC S2345678B, residing at 123 Fictional Lane, Singapore, and Quantum Innovations Pte. Ltd., UEN T12LL3456C, having its principal place of business at 456 Imaginary Road, Singapore.

1. Confidential Information. For the purpose of this Agreement, "Confidential Information" shall mean any data or information, oral or written, disclosed by either party to the other that is not generally known to the public, including but not limited to business plans, project status updates, and financial data. Confidential Information shall not include information that is publicly available or known prior to the execution of this Agreement.

2. Obligations of the Parties. Each party agrees to retain in confidence and not disclose to any third party any Confidential Information received from the other party. This obligation shall continue for a period of three years from the date of disclosure. The parties agree not to use the Confidential Information for any purpose other than the evaluation and execution of potential business transactions under this Agreement. Any breach of this clause may result in legal action.

For any communications, parties may contact Dr. Jonathan Tan via email at jonathan.tan@fictional.sg or phone at +65 9876 5432. Alternatively, Quantum Innovations Pte. Ltd. can be reached at info@quantum.sg or +65 8765 4321.

Signed:  
Dr. Jonathan Tan  
Quantum Innovations Pte. Ltd.
